synopsis: An Instagram carousel from the leftist podcast @upstreampodcast promoting an episode critiquing the Democratic Party, built mostly from screenshotted satire and opinion posts. The one hard factual claim — that every Democratic senator voted to confirm Marco Rubio as Secretary of State — is accurate: the Senate confirmed him 99-0 on January 20, 2025, with no Democrat opposed. The rest is opinion, satire, and Marxist historical interpretation rather than gradeable fact.
